name: Foxus
short_description: Foxus is a relaxing action-adventure video game. Head off on an adventure in the magical forest of Alandia and resolve its mysteries.
detailed_description:
ADD TO WISHLIST

You can now already add the game to your wishlist, this way you will get news and updates directly from Steam.


About the Game

Foxus is a relaxing action-adventure video game. Head off on an adventure in the magical forest of Alandia and resolve its mysteries.

EXPLORE THE FOREST AND ITS SURROUNDINGS

Take a walk through the serene forests and valleys of Alandia.

MEET THE INHABITANTS

Along the way you will meet new quaint characters.

COLLECT 'EM ALL

Collect strawberries and other items as you progress through your adventure.
